description: Perform a One-Way ANOVA with Polynomial Contrasts on the 'Viagra.csv' dataset (/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/Viagra.csv) to test for linear and quadratic trends in libido across dosage levels. Use 'libido' as the dependent variable and 'dose' as the fixed factor. The analysis must include a homogeneity test and Omega-squared (ω²) effect size. Save the Jamovi project to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/Viagra_TrendAnalysis.omv. Document the Levene's test p-value (Levene_p), the linear trend p-value (Linear_p), the quadratic trend p-value (Quadratic_p), and the Omega-squared value (Omega_sq) in a text file at /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/trend_report.txt.
